title: rubus deflexispinus
intro: Rubus deflexispinus, also known as the bent-blackberry or blackberry with bent thorns, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus deflexispinus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Rubus deflexispinus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems of the plant in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
